title: verbascum uschakense
intro: Verbascum uschakense, also known as Ushak mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum uschakense include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is often used in traditional folk medicine.
